2. Prepare your documents (transcripts, English proof, CV).
3. Apply directly on the university's online portal.
4. Pay any application fee if required.
5. Submit before the deadline and wait for the decision.
warnings: Confirm this program is taught in English for international students. Some CS programs also have a Chinese-taught track.
Most Pakistani students pair admission with the CSC scholarship — see the Scholarships tab.
Dates change every year.

costs.note: Self-funded English-taught CS Master's usually cost €2,500–5,000 per year (≈ €1,250–2,500 per semester), varying by university. Many pair admission with the CSC scholarship. Confirm.

intakes.note: Autumn intake. Applications go to each university's international portal, usually between December and May.

application.fee_note: Apply to each university's international student portal. Many charge an application fee. Check the program page.

requirements.ielts_note: English proof (IELTS or TOEFL) is required. Confirm the minimum score.
